title: Australia Says Weighing All Options After ‘Unjustified’ Tariffs
description: Australia’s government said it will “examine all options” after US President Donald Trump imposed a 15% tariff on foreign imports.
content: Australia’s government said it will “examine all options” after US President Donald Trump imposed a 15% tariff on foreign imports.
